title: tragacantha scopulorum
intro: Tragacantha scopulorum, also known as the mountain treacle bush or bitter treacle, is a shrub-like plant native to the mountains of South Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Tragacantha scopulorum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
